revision_goal: Recover own-view identity evidence by replacing zero-standoff candidate viewpoints with non-GT standoff viewpoints before any post-observation rule or threshold change.

selection_rule: Generate candidate standoff points from non-GT target and rival candidate geometry.
Snap each candidate point to the Habitat navmesh when available.
Reject any snapped or geometric viewpoint with target horizontal distance below min_standoff_distance_m.
Reject any viewpoint above max_standoff_distance_m or without a valid yaw toward the target candidate.
Score feasible viewpoints by distance-to-preferred-standoff, snap distance, travel proxy, and navmesh navigability.
If no feasible standoff exists, skip the target row with a skip reason; do not fallback to candidate visit_position or target position.

expected_failure_taxonomy.standoff_unavailable: No non-GT standoff point can be generated or snapped for a target candidate.
expected_failure_taxonomy.standoff_navmesh_snap_fail: Generated standoff candidates cannot be snapped to a navigable point.
expected_failure_taxonomy.standoff_all_too_close: Every generated viewpoint remains below the minimum standoff distance.
expected_failure_taxonomy.standoff_all_too_far: Every generated viewpoint exceeds the maximum standoff distance.
expected_failure_taxonomy.standoff_no_valid_yaw: Candidate viewpoint cannot face the target candidate.
expected_failure_taxonomy.post_observation_no_own_support_after_st: Standoff geometry passes, but detector evidence still yields no own association.
expected_failure_taxonomy.post_observation_cross_view_aliasing_aft: Own evidence exists but rival/cross evidence remains competitive.

direction_judgment.fact: The broader failure was caused by a planner substrate issue: zero-standoff viewpoints made own-view association impossible despite detector availability.
direction_judgment.agent_inference: The research direction remains valid because the failure mechanism strengthens the argument that semantic uncertainty must become active observation utility with geometry-aware viewpoint selection, not just detector re-ranking or threshold tuning.
direction_judgment.risk: If a zero-standoff-safe planner still cannot produce own-view evidence on the broader split, the contribution should narrow to viewpoint feasibility and semantic-memory observability limits before claiming ObjectNav utility.
